## Summary

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Content fix (typo, wording, broken link)
- [ ] New or rewritten guide / package page
- [ ] Template, layout, or styling change
- [ ] Build or deploy tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I previewed the change locally with `php -S 127.0.0.1:9090 router.php`
- [ ] Internal links and the sidebar still resolve
- [ ] `build-static.php` completes without errors (if I touched templates or the build)
- [ ] I did not commit `_site/` or edit the `gh-pages` branch by hand
